Name: PV DC Losses

Caption.String: Enable and disable subarrays on the System Sizing page.
DC losses apply to the electrical output of each subarray and account for losses not calculated by the module performance model.
Apply default losses to replace DC losses for all subarrays with default values appropriate for central inverters, microinverters, or DC optmizers.
Total DC power loss = 100% * [  1 - the product of ( 1 - loss/100%  )  ]

Callbacks: // hide inputs for disabled subarrays (always show subarray 1 inputs)
bifacial_mismatch_enable(); //this will enable or disable bifacial inputs, so needs to be called even if not bifacial
msg = 'DC power optimizer loss applies to all subarrays.';
